channel.title: Pages on Utshab Pyakurel
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Utshab Pyakurel

item.title: About
item.description: About Me Hi, my name is Utshab Pyakurel and I am a software developer with a passion for building innovative and useful applications. I completed my Bachelor of Computer Engineering from Paschimanchal Campus and have been actively learning and growing as a developer ever since. In my free time, I enjoy exploring new technologies and learning about different programming languages and frameworks. I also enjoy watching movies and staying up-to-date with the latest trends in the tech industry.
